Why Are We Interested in Validating on gno.land:
•We believes Gnoland-based with smart contracts in combination with AtomOne can make good collaboration. I'm a validator for many blockchain projects and an enthusiastic node runner dedicated to operating nodes for blockchain projects. 
•We have supported gno.land with infrastructure, snapshots, public endpoints, and tools.
 
•I'm currently joined gnoland testnet from test6

1. Validator name: linkednode

2. Networks & AuM:

•⁠  ⁠AtomOne: 126K $ATONE
• Arkeo: 34K $ARKEO
•⁠  ⁠CrossFi: 9,866,000 MPX

5. Why gno.land?:

We're linkednode, independent validator for blockchain projects who participate and contribute many network. We're experienced to deploy a services and maintain the server.
We're committed to maintaining a fair and transparent approach to commission rates, with a focus on ensuring the long-term success of the network and the best interests of our delegators.
We are interested in participating in the incentivized testnet for several reasons. Firstly, we see it as an opportunity to contribute to the development and improvement of the network by actively testing its functionality and identifying any potential bugs or vulnerabilities. By participating in the testnet, we hope to provide valuable feedback to the developers, ultimately leading to a more robust and reliable platform.

6. Contributions:

We are strives to providing documents guide, monitoring, public RPC services in the future to make things easier for other operators. We're actively support testnet networks for testing.

**Validator Name:** **cunum**

cunum is a small solo validator, validating for NEAR protocol since January 2023, involved in the Cosmos ecosystem as user since 2021, validating for GovGen from genesis till sunset and for AtomOne from week 1 till today.

**Networks You Are Currently Validating:**

- AtomOne (ATONE)
- Near Protocol (NEAR)

**Links to Your Digital Presence:**

**Contact Details:**

**Why You Are Interested in Validating on gno.land:**

The project is a promising and innovative new approach to blockchain tech and in general I want to support Jae as a thank you for all that he has done for the crypto community.

**Contributions to gno.land:**

- Participation in Testnets

Reliable infrastructure. Secure operations. Long-term commitment.  ---  ## 👋 About Us  DNSARZ Validator is an independent blockchain infrastructure provider with extensive experience operating Cosmos SDK validators, RPC services, snapshots, explorers, and developer tools. We are committed to supporting the Gno ecosystem with reliable infrastructure and active community participation.  ---  ## 🌐 Main Networks  - AtomOne — 90,319 ATONE - Axone — 1,167,179 AXONE - DungeonChain — 11,046,548 DGN - Epix — 645,205,966 EPIX - Jay Network — 2,226,258 JAY - Medas Digital — 5,391,530 MEDAS - Realio — 2,842,904 STAKE - Lumen - 46,203 LMN - BitBadges — 260,082 BADGE - BLockx - 9,221,006 BCX  ## Tesnet  - Atomone - Lantanda - Monolythium - Daodiseo - Republic - Limonata - Gnoland  ---  # 🚀 Why Gno?  DNSARZ has been supporting the Gno ecosystem by providing infrastructure and operational resources for node operators. Our existing contributions include:  - Public archival RPC endpoints - Public REST endpoints - Snapshots for fast synchronization - Installation guides - Node operator cheat sheets - Community technical support  We look forward to expanding these contributions as an active validator.  ---  # 🌍 Links \*\*Website\*\* https://dnsarz.net  \*\*Gno Services\*\* https://dnsarz.net/services/testnet/gnoland/  \*\*GitHub\*\* https://github.com/aidilfahmi  \*\*X \(Twitter\)\*\* https://x.com/aidilfahmii  ---  # 📬 Contact  Email dnsarz@gmail.com  Discord @dnsarz  ---
